title: Warning Misleading name: all 24 files are 1-line title stubs (466 bytes total)
public_claim: The package self-advertises as a "Final Comparative Rhetoric Atlas" — a complete set of 20 rhetorical device cards plus taxonomy, drills, and master index.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It functions as a professional-development control surface: roles, competencies, evidence, and next actions are organized so preparation can be audited rather than guessed.
